---
title: "How to Fit a xsdm model"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{How to Fit a xsdm model}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

A detailed PDF guide on how to fit an xsdm model is available on the
package website:

- [How to Fit a xsdm model (PDF)](https://xsdm-project.github.io/xsdm/articles/howToFit.pdf)
